response.overview: "Vile Lynn" follows Lynn, a highly driven young violinist preparing for a life-changing audition to get into Juilliard. Consumed by perfectionism and haunted by a voice she can never reach. She becomes obsessive, pushing away everyone who cares about her, and spirals into anxiety and self-hatred.
response.tagline: I hope your image of me isn't vile.
response.title: Vile Lynn
